code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic}}}%%

sequenceDiagram
autonumber

box #8b5cf6 UI
  participant UIA as C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub A
  participant UIB as C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub B
end

box #ff8b00 Core Services
  participant HUBA as C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
  participant HUBB as C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B
  participant META as C2-07 Metrics and Analytics
  participant SECA as C2-10 Security and Audit A
  participant SECB as C2-10 Security and Audit B
end

box #e5e7eb Transport
  participant BUS as Federation Transport P2P channel
end

%% -------- Establish link and capabilities --------
UIA ->> HUBA: open federation console
HUBA ->> BUS: initiatePeerLink offer caps versions
BUS ->> HUBB: deliverPeerOffer
HUBB ->> HUBB: validate caps and versions
HUBB ->> BUS: acceptPeerLink and session keys
BUS ->> HUBA: linkEstablished
HUBA -->> SECA: audit link established
HUBB -->> SECB: audit link established

%% -------- Periodic health and resonance signals --------
loop heartbeat interval
  HUBA ->> BUS: send HubSignal metrics latency sri window
  BUS ->> HUBB: forward HubSignal
  HUBB -->> META: event HubSignal DDD EVT 14
  META -->> META: event KPIUpdated DDD EVT 26

  HUBB ->> BUS: send HubSignal metrics latency sri window
  BUS ->> HUBA: forward HubSignal
  HUBA -->> META: event HubSignal DDD EVT 14
  META -->> META: event KPIUpdated DDD EVT 26
end

%% -------- Degradation detection and peer alert --------
alt degradation detected at Hub B
  HUBB ->> HUBB: detect packet loss or coherence drop
  HUBB ->> BUS: send PeerAlert status degraded
  BUS ->> HUBA: deliver PeerAlert
  HUBA -->> META: event PeerAlert DDD EVT 44
  HUBA -->> SECA: record peer alert and context
else normal
  HUBA ->> HUBA: update peer health registry
end

%% -------- Optional rate and backpressure control --------
alt high load on Hub A
  HUBA ->> BUS: throttle request new interval
  BUS ->> HUBB: apply throttle
  HUBB ->> HUBB: adjust heartbeat interval
else balanced
  HUBA ->> HUBA: keep current interval
end

%% -------- Optional failover path --------
alt peer unresponsive
  HUBA ->> BUS: ping and retry
  BUS ->> HUBA: timeout
  HUBA -->> SECA: open incident and timer
  SECA ->> SECA: correlate with local anomalies
  SECA -->> META: publish incident kpi update
  META -->> META: event KPIUpdated DDD EVT 26
else responsive
  HUBA ->> HUBA: clear incident timers
end

%% -------- UI updates --------
META -->> UIA: stream health and sri charts
META -->> UIB: stream health and sri charts

%% -------- Close or rotate session --------
opt rotate session keys
  HUBA ->> BUS: rotateKeys request
  BUS ->> HUBB: rotateKeys execute
  HUBB -->> SECB: audit key rotation
  HUBA -->> SECA: audit key rotation
end

%% -------- Completion --------
HUBA ->> BUS: closePeerLink
BUS ->> HUBB: notify link closed
HUBA -->> SECA: audit link closed
HUBB -->> SECB: audit link closed

%% Notes
Note over HUBA,HUBB: HubSignal DDD EVT 14 carries health resonance and latency fields
Note over HUBA,META: KPIUpdated DDD EVT 26 emitted on each processed signal batch
Note over HUBA: PeerAlert DDD EVT 44 indicates degradation or policy breach on peer
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个工业PLC的联邦架构时序图。核心是两个本地Hub：C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A和B，它们通过Federation Transport P2P channel进行对等通信。另外要有C2-07 Metrics and Analytics做指标收集，以及双节点的C2-10 Security and Audit做审计。
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 明白，Hub A和Hub B是对等关系。那UI层怎么安排？需要体现操作控制台吗？
elements_involved: C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub A
C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，加两个C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub，分别对应A和B，放在UI区域。整个流程从UI A打开federation console开始，Hub A向P2P channel发起peer link，协商版本和能力，Hub B验证后返回session keys。
elements_involved: C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub A
C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub B
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 已画出建连流程。接下来是心跳机制？
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，用loop表示心跳间隔。Hub A和B互相发送HubSignal，包含metrics、latency、sri window。每次Hub B收到后，向Metrics and Analytics上报HubSignal DDD EVT 14事件，然后内部触发KPIUpdated DDD EVT 26。Hub A收到信号后也做同样的上报。
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 心跳循环已添加。需要处理异常场景吗，比如节点降级？
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 需要。用alt分支：当Hub B检测到degradation，比如packet loss或coherence drop，它会通过P2P channel向Hub A发送PeerAlert。Hub A收到后上报Metrics and Analytics的PeerAlert DDD EVT 44事件，同时记录到Security and Audit A。如果是normal情况，Hub A只更新peer health registry。
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 降级检测分支已完成。还有其他控制逻辑吗？
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 再加两个可选分支。第一个是backpressure控制：当Hub A高负载时，通过P2P channel发送throttle request调整心跳间隔，Hub B应用后调整自身interval。第二个是failover：如果peer无响应，Hub A重试超时后向Security and Audit A开incident，SECA关联本地异常后向Metrics and Analytics发布incident kpi update，触发KPIUpdated DDD EVT 26。
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 高负载节流和故障转移都画好了。最后怎么收尾？
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 结尾几件事：Metrics and Analytics向两个UI hub流式推送health和sri图表；加一个opt分支表示可选的session key rotation，Hub A发起rotateKeys，两边SECA和SECB都要审计；最后是closePeerLink，Hub A通知P2P channel关闭，两边Hub各自审计link closed。
elements_involved: C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub A
C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub B
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 全部流程已绘制完成。我在Hub A和Hub B上方加了注释说明HubSignal DDD EVT 14携带的字段，以及Hub A和Metrics之间关于KPIUpdated的说明，还有Hub A单独关于PeerAlert DDD EVT 44的注释。
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 完美，这些注释正好对应三个关键事件。整个时序图完整覆盖了联邦链路的建立、心跳共振、降级检测、背压控制、故障转移和优雅关闭的全生命周期。
elements_involved: C2-06 Local Hub and Federation A
C2-06 Local Hub and Federation B
C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub A
C2-12 Resonance Board UI Hub B
